detail: idle warp re-enabled with orbital differential — at idle, the warp from the orbiting cursor has the mouse-at-card-center baseline subtracted and both axes recentered, so the static zoom/translation cancel out and only the corner shape morph renders. Commit `51529c2` on `new` (HMR). Cards should now visibly wobble in shape at rest without translating or growing.
